entry.title: Re: Basics of MRP Area
entry.content: Very well explained article. Kudos.

entry.title: Day wise Recurring Journal Entry Posting Required
entry.content:
We are trying to get an daily wise posting the recurring Journal entry, we want the recurrence pattern to be used with Daily option, as it is currently applicable only for monthly and weekly.

Can you please suggest us which option can be used to post recurring journal entry on daily basis instead of monthly or weekly.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Day wise Recurring Journal Entry Posting Required
entry.content:
Please follow the resolution steps provided in the KBA attached below.
3516666 - Requirements for Posting Day-Wise Recurring Journal Entries - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: Use Method IF_EX_ME_PO_PRICING_CUST~PROCESS_KOMP for Update Net Price
entry.content:
Hallo Wolfgang, 

we have the same probleme and can´t find a solution.

How did you solve your problem.

Thanks in advance

best regards

yvonne

entry.title: How to Disbale Default Group Calculations execution?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a scenario where I change the custom field value and in the backend executing a global script to update the Quote Item Custom Field, so the respective calculation group is executing and next to that Default Calculations Group also executing, is there a way we can restrict the execution of Default Calculation Group?

We are using Quote 1.0.

Thanks in Advance

SAP CPQ

entry.title: Re: Add standard field to Fiori App F2358
entry.content:
Hi,

As far as I can tell, this is the only app that lest us create a list of orders at an item level.

And yes, it comes from an operational requirement. We have a 3PL that require us to provide this information when communicating with them.

And to be honest, I find it really strange that this is so inflexible that we cant make a simple list showing information that is readily available on the order.

Do we really have to tell our logistics department that we have to develop a custom app just because they want to see incoterm for a line item?

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Cheat Sheet: Amounts and Quantities in ABAP CDS
entry.content:
Hi @AndreaUS ,

I have a use case where I need to calculate AMOUNT / QUANTITY to get PER_UNIT_AMOUNT .

I am facing some CDS errors which I just posted in my post yesterday : CDS VIEW ENTITY - CURR / QUAN calculated field gives activation error 

In your blog post, I saw the use of CalculatedIUnit to achieve this calculation, which is bit strange in my opinion, as we are still trying to get a Calculated AMOUNT (and not quantity), (Amount / Quantity -> gives Amount), so why we mandatorily need a separate unit reference and not just use the CUKY reference instead? 

Moreover, if we have multiple calculated amounts, then for each Amount field calculation, I need a separate calculatedUnit (having the same or different value).

 I have a real use case to convert atleast 15 cost fields from KEPH table (say KST001...KST015 ) to get per unit cost for materials in business report. So with this approach, I need to create 15 'calculatedUnit' fields in the CDS having the same value (say EUR / KG).

This is not CLEAN ABAP in my opinion, and I am still looking for a better and simpler way of achieving this.

If I compare with trditional ABAP programming, a simple arithmetic operation of CURR / QUAN (eg. LV_AMOUNT = BSEG-DMBTR / BSEG-MENGE) works perfectly fine, without any additional logic or unit conversions, and I was expecting the same in CDS VIEW ENTITY as well.

I wonder, why so much complexity in CDS for a simple calculation.

any suggestions? 

Regards,

Bharat Bajaj

entry.title: Custom field enabled not available in UI in app Post General Journal Entries
entry.content:
APP: Custom fields, enables Posting General Journal entries, but APP: Posting General journal entries, fields cannot be added


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Validation like committed qty not greather than avail...
entry.content:
Hi @nikunjmehta2290 ,

SELECT * FROM OWTQ T0
INNER JOIN WTQ1 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry"
LEFT JOIN OITW T2 ON T1."ItemCode" = T2."ItemCode" WHERE T2."IsCommited" < T2."OnHand"

entry.title: Re: Custom field enabled not available in UI in app Post...
entry.content:
See help.sap.com documentation on App Extensibility: Post General Journal Entries 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/e5defe0a850948d1bd7a2834739745c6.html?locale=en-US

"Key users can extend the app in the Custom Fields and Logic app using the business context Coding Block.

You can add fields to the following UI elements using UI adaptation at runtime:

note 2453614 - FAQ: Universal Journal Extensibility

outlines that Coding Block extension in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is Available in Fiori Reuse UI for many transactions that post journal entries, 

It is not used for customer or supplier line items (account type D or K in ACDOCA table), but derivation is possible with FIN_CODING_BLOCK_SUBSTITUTION enhancement option.

In relation to S/4HANA key user extensibility using Custom Fields and Custom Logic apps and Journal Entry Item business context

Field values cannot be entered manually, but display is possible in Manage Journal Entries Fiori app, 


See also kbas
2642121 - Custom Field for Journal not available in Journal Entry app

3448139 - Manage Journal Entries Extensibility

 3491508 How to add the custom fields in payload for Journal Entry API - SAP HANA Cloud?

entry.title: Re: Usage of PRT to balance Maximum number of Molds in SA...
entry.content:
Hi Paulo, 

>3 years old, but maybe worth a try: 

We ran into a comparable restriction in  a project and also thought about the PRTs.
Is that how you solved it after all? 

Best regards, Dennis

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5: How can i add a different css class to each F...
entry.content:
Hi, 

I know this is too late for your project, but this could help someone else facing similar issue.

Solution : you can add customData aggregation to FeedListItem. This will add new attribute called data-*  (in below case it would be data-color=<dynmic value from 'class' property binding) li tag of the rendered HTML. 

There could me more than one such lists in your entire project so it is better to apply CSS with a custom class or specific Id to the List. I have used custom class called "customList" and added it to List.

<mvc:View xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core">
<FeedInput
    post="onPost"
    icon="test-resources/sap/m/images/dronning_victoria.jpg"
    />

<List
    showSeparators="Inner"
    items="{/EntryCollection}" class="customList">
    <FeedListItem
        sender="{Author}"
        icon="{AuthorPicUrl}"
        senderPress="onSenderPress"
        iconPress="onIconPress"
        iconDensityAware="false"
        info="{Type}"
        timestamp="{Date}"
        text="{Text}" >
        <customData>
            <core:CustomData key="color" value="{class}" writeToDom="true"/>
        <customData>
    </FeedListItem>
</List>
</mvc:View>

Once above XML view gets rendered to DOM, It would contain.. 

<div class="customList .. and other standard classes">

   <ul>
      <li data-color="green">
         <div> ... </div>
      </li>
      <li data-color="red">
         <div> ... </div>
      </li>
      <li data-color="blue">
         <div> ... </div>
      </li>
      ... and so on
   </ul>
</div>

you can apply different style based on value of data-color attribute as below.

.customList li[data-color="green"]{
background-color : green;
}

.customList li[data-color="red"]{
background-color : red;
}

 let me know if this helps.

entry.title: How to extend Supplier Registration Invitation link in SLP
entry.content: I would like to setup the invitation for Supplier Registration and therefore configure the link expiration up to 30 days. WHere I can find this setup?

entry.title: Re: How to create a posting area in FS-CD?

please refer to notes 1469987 - FQC0: Customer-specific posting areas - SAP for Me and 520127 - FI-CA consulting note: Account determination and posting areas - SAP for Me

Kind Regards,

Tobias

entry.title: Re: Announcing SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 5th October 2024
entry.content: Looking forward for SAP Business AI - 2nd edition and 3rd sitblr 2024 !

entry.title: Which Joule functions will be available for Customers who don't have Employee Central module?
entry.content: Which Joule functions will be available for Customers who don't have Employee Central module? I couldn't find any clear functionality list matched with modules in use. Can somebody help?

entry.title: BUPT further checks - get current address data into PAI function module
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I need to implement check on entry (user action) in transaction BP, field Country (in section address) 
I used bdt Analyzer and found this 

Using BUPT transaction it is easy to implement further checks on PAI

Within that function module I am unable to find current address data.
I've tried using all methods I could find (for example cvi_bdt_adapter=>get_current_bp_data)

But I am still unable to find current address data.

Any ideas as to how to proceed?

entry.title: How to Upload a File in a RAP Freestyle V2 Application?
entry.content:
I'm working on reading data from an Excel file, but due to customer restrictions, I'm unable to use third-party libraries. My approach is to upload the Excel file to the backend, process the content there, and then send the data back to the frontend.

I am using UploadSet for the file upload, and while the upload process claims to be successful, the corresponding table in the backend is not being populated. I also tried using unmanaged save with RAP, but the code doesn't seem to be triggered when I attempt to upload the file.

Doe anyone know how to handle this scenario or what I am doing wrong?

Sample Codes:

UploadSet:

 

<upload:UploadSet
  id="idAttach"
  instantUpload="false"
  uploadEnabled="true"                         
  uploadUrl="/sap/opu/odata/sap/SERVICE/InvoiceAttachSet"
  mode="None">
</upload:UploadSet>

 

Upload JS:

 

onUploadBtn: function(){
  var oAttachmentUpl = that.getView().byId("idAttach"); 
  var aIncompleteItems = oAttachmentUpl.getIncompleteItems();
  var iIncompleteItems = aIncompleteItems.length;

  for(var i = 0; i < iIncompleteItems; i++){
    var sFileName =  aIncompleteItems[i].getProperty("fileName");
    var oXCSRFToken = new sap.ui.core.Item({
      key: "X-CSRF-Token",
      text: that.getOwnerComponent().getModel("SERVICE").getSecurityToken()
    });
    var oSlug = new sap.ui.core.Item({
      key: "SLUG",
      text: sEingangnr + "/" + sFileName
    });
                
  oAttachmentUpl.addHeaderField(oXCSRFToken).addHeaderField(oSlug);
  oAttachmentUpl.uploadItem(aIncompleteItems[i]);
  oAttachmentUpl.removeAllHeaderFields();
  } 
}

 

RAP Behavior Definition:

 

managed implementation in class xxx unique;
strict ( 2) );

define behavior for xxx alias Excelupload
with unmanaged save
lock master

authorization master ( instance )
{
 create;
 update;
 field (readonly) Equnr;
}

entry.title: Re: SAML2 service not accessibleWhat has happened?Calling...
entry.content: The System working on many computer normally except my laptop it gaves this error message

entry.title: Re: SAP BAS commit changing xs-security.json
entry.content:
Found the reason ... 

A git pre-commit hook is executing 

exec basctl --command cicd.showLCAPManifest --param $PWD

This is corrupting the file...

entry.title: Re: solr admin page connection refused after upgrading to...
entry.content: hi @geffchang yes, it still responds ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED, maybe this could be a firewall issue? the server is started via WSL and Chrome is accessing it via windows

entry.title: Re: ABAP Calling last calling program in the stack
entry.content:
@ulrich_mhrke 

Below is the code of PAI of ZPROG1 (Screen 400)

 

MODULE user_command_0400 INPUT.
 CASE sy-ucomm.
    WHEN 'NEWMAT'.
      "test run
      SET PARAMETER ID 'OPTION' FIELD 'MAT'.
      CALL TRANSACTION 'ZTRANS'.

 

This code is calling selection screen of ZTRANS transaction.

 

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK b1 WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-001.
PARAMETERS : cust  RADIOBUTTON GROUP g1 DEFAULT 'X'  USER-COMMAND cmd  MODIF ID upd,

 

and some more parameters at selection screen.
Once selection screen is executed it is calling ALV grid using REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY function. Once grid is displayed and back is pressed then it again comes back to selection screen of ZTRANS. From here, if we press back, then it exits the transaction and not going back to screen 400 of ZPROG1.
We have tried to use AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON EXIT-COMMAND. Also under ZTRANS program and in that we tried to use SET SCREEN 0 or CALL TRANSACTION (of 400 screen) but it's not going back to screen 400.

About your second question, attribute of screen 400 (next screen) is set to 400 and it is not empty.

entry.title: Re: Hiding Row in list uibb in sap mdg fpm
entry.content: Hi, were you able to find any solution for this ? I have the same requirement

entry.title: Release Navigator for SAP BTP - What's New in Q3 2024
entry.content:
The Release Navigator for SAP BTP is always evolving to better serve our customers. With the latest update in Q3 2024, in addition to quarterly content maintenance and a new product page we've made significant improvements to the user experience:

  1. New Side Menu for improved page navigation
  2. New UI Elements for additional context
  3. New Search Feature 

Read more about the details of these enhancements in this blog post.

This section details the new UX features added to the release navigator for SAP BTP.

New Side Menu for Easier Navigation

We've implemented a new side menu on every page of the release navigator to provide a more intuitive user experience. This menu allows easy navigation to the four new main pages of the release navigator:

  1. Product Specific
  2. General
  3. Get Assistance
  4. User Feedback

Fig 1. The side menu on all new pages

As a result, some content previously found on the Home page has been rearranged. Let’s walk through what you can find on each of the new pages.

Product Specific Page

This page serves as the starting point for the release navigator and corresponds to the former Home page. It contains the core of the release navigator: curated release information for specific products and services of SAP BTP as well as information on release schedules.

Fig 2. The Product Specific page, formerly known as the Home page

At the top of the Product Specific Page you can find a message tile with helpful information and a Release Calendar. The calendar includes release dates for SAP BTP as a whole, links to product-specific release schedules and dates for upcoming release navigator updates.

Below you can find the section Products. The cards in this section are sorted alphabetically and each one takes you to a dedicated page with in-depth information and curated resources on the 27 SAP BTP products and services covered.

Product Page Navigation

Fig 3. Example of a dedicated product page

Once you are done exploring the resources on a product page and want to move on to the next product or service, you can either click on Product Specific on the side-menu or on the back arrow on the left of the page title to get back to the Product Specific page and navigate to other pages.

General Page

On this page you can find General Resources that are helpful across all SAP BTP products and services. If you can't find a certain product or service on the Product Specific page, we recommend you check out the resources on this page (and also feel free to let us know in our survey).

Besides the General resources, there are two more sections on this page:

  • Additional Resources contains non-release specific but nevertheless important resources one should be aware of.
  • Release Navigators by SAP Enterprise Support provide direct links to all currently available release navigators for other solution areas.

Fig 4. The General page

Get Assistance Page

This page contains resources to help you use the release navigator and to improve your experience. You can access it from all pages in the release navigator by either clicking on Get Assistance in the side-menu or by clicking on the red bar at the very top of the page.

At the top of the page, you can find the following elements:

  • Release Navigator Enablement:
    • SAP Community Blog Posts: These blog posts go into detail about new features that are being added to the release navigator and provide other news.
    • SAP Partner Masterclass: This recorded digital session is only available to SAP partners.
  • Translation Feature: Allows you to translate the release navigator (not the pages linked to) into 40 languages. The translation process takes a few moments and may impact layout and design of the navigator pages. Click on this card to sign in to the authenticated version with Universal ID or an S-user account to use this feature.
  • User Feedback: Click here to provide feedback in a quick 3 question survey.

Below you can find the Navigation Tips, detailed instructions on how to use the release navigator, similar to the blog post you are reading now.

Fig 5. The Get Assistance page

User Feedback Page

We've embedded a feedback survey on this page with three short questions to gather feedback and suggestions for improvement.

  • Your relationship to SAP.
  • Whether you found the release navigator helpful.
  • An open text field that allows you to let us know anything you liked, what you would like to see added, or what you think could be improved.

We strive to always improve the release navigator, so we really appreciate any feedback you submit.

Fig 6. The User Feedback page

Helpful UI Elements

We added two new types of UI elements that you will find throughout the pages of the navigator.

Lightbulb icon

Many pages come with additional information to guide you through the cards available on that page and provide more context on when to use which resource.

If you see a lightbulb icon next to a header, you can hover over it with your cursor to open a text bubble with additional information about that page.

The bubble can be moved around by clicking and holding your cursor and can be closed by clicking the  on the top right.Fig 7. Demo of the lightbulb icon text bubble

On product pages, the information displayed in this bubble corresponds to the information formerly found on Release Guidance tiles.

About this Card

Some resource cards come with additional tips and contextual information.

If you see three dots on the bottom right of a card, you can open a tip with additional information about that particular card. To open the link of that card, you need to close this tip by clicking the three dots button again.

Fig 8. Demo on the About this Card tips

Due to the high demand for dedicated pages for products and services, the number of pages to navigate has grown significantly since launch of the release navigator one year ago and we aim to increase the number of pages even further in future updates. More pages mean more content but also more cards to browse, which can increase the time it takes to find what you’re looking for.

Our goal is for you to find what you need as quickly as possible. That’s why we implemented a new Search Feature, which allows you to search for keywords and find all pages associated with this topic, product or service name. Click on the  Search icon at the shell bar and a pop-up will open. Once you enter key words, you will see which pages are associated to this term and you can jump directly to them. The search feature is optimized for product and service names.

Fig 9. Short demo of the Search function.

We collaborated closely with SAP BTP experts to add a new page for SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery. This page contains links to the release schedule, SAP Roadmap Explorer, What’s New Viewer in the SAP Help Portal and more. Check it out.

Fig 10. The new page for SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery.

Currently, the release navigator for SAP BTP covers content for 27 products and services on dedicated pages. For all products and services not featured with their own page you can find helpful resources on the new General page.

Expect more new pages dedicated to specific products and services in future updates and don't hesitate to let us know via our feedback survey, which products or services you would like to see added next. 

Last update, we announced the new SAP Note Consolidated Release Schedules for SAP BTP and the corresponding initiative of communicating the release schedules of SAP BTP products and services.

We are happy to report that the number of products and services who are communicating their release schedules has further increased to more than 50 now thanks to close collaboration with various SAP BTP teams.

Check the schedules here and from the Release Calendar section of the navigator.

Tip: Did you know you can mark notes as a favorite? If you do so, you will be notified via email whenever the note is being updated. This way you can stay on top of new release schedule communication, like new dates or skipped waves. We recommend you mark all those notes as a favorite that you are interested in receiving updates for.

Fig 11. Where to click to mark a note as a favorite and receive notifications once it gets updated.

Please note: To access SAP Notes you need to log in to SAP for Me using your Universal ID or S-user ID. Read more about the required authorizations here.

Next updates are scheduled on a quarterly basis in alignment with the Harmonized Release Calendar for SAP Cloud Products.*Disclaimer: The schedule is subject to change without prior notice including, when necessary, delays or incorporating changes in subsequent update windows and not a commitment, promise, or legal obligation to deliver any material, code, or functionality.Looking ahead, 2025 updates will mainly focus on quarterly maintenance of release resources and a steady extension of product coverage. Currently, there are no plans for further mayor UI updates in the near future.

The Readiness@Scale team at SAP Enterprise Support is dedicated to ensuring release readiness across the SAP Enterprise Support portfolio. Our mission is to empower SAP customers to be prepared and ready to adopt and utilize innovations.

If you have any feedback or specific requests for content in the release navigator, please don't hesitate to reach out to us.

And don't forget to check out our team's blogs tagged with Readiness@Scale.

Happy navigating!

Readiness@Scale 
SAP Enterprise Support

entry.title: Re: ABAP Calling last calling program in the stack
entry.content: Please don't post an answer for comments, additional details. Answer is reserved to propose a solution. Instead, use Replies > Comment (on the question or on a proposed answer).

entry.title: Re: cloud studio is unavailable
entry.content: 1. Go to settings (on the top right hand side) 2. Go with dependencies (On the left hand side) 3. Go with Add (On top right hand side) 4. go with Add a Business Process Project Dependency 5. Search for Google Cloud Storage SDK - add it this should solve ur problem

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Cloud and Bots Filtering
entry.content:
Hi Joris,
why is that following statement true ? "Bot IP range filtering strategy cannot be applied.." ?

When it comes to SAP commerce cloud (CCv2) you can blacklist certain IP Ranges that are known for the bad bots.
There are also GIT Repos available with lists of suspicious BOT IPs; i cannot find that currently again.

Another option for CCv2 is the build-in lightweight firewall , where you can limit the request per minute. However that 3 predefined limits are not very granular, but should target the bots, not real users.

entry.title: no reference documents appear when create return order in app "Manage Customer Returns "
entry.content:
Hi experts，

When I create return order in PCE following scope item 3TE, in page "Create Returns Order from Reference Document", there are no reference documents in the list and appear even though I cleared all the filters. however, we already created many sales orders and billing documents.  

is there any one can tell me if I miss any configuration for return order in fiori?

entry.title: Re: I want to make only certain rows editable in table control.
entry.content: People never answer more quickly if you ask, they answer when they can.

entry.title: Re: Story filter becomes open for user modification after...
entry.content:
After a chat with SAP expert, we came to a conclusion that this is indeed current (yet unexpected) behaviour of the API.

I created an Improvement Request regarding this issue. If anyone has a similar need, please vote under the link below, so SAP may fix it.

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/330671/

entry.title: Re: Create ticket for all the unassociated email in C4C
entry.content: We have implemented the same solution but we are facing an issue, unable to link inbound email to the newly created ticket timeline. Were you able to link email with ticket so that email is visible in timeline view in ticket? If yes, please provide some pointers to show inbound email in the ticket also

entry.title: Re: I want to make only certain rows editable in table control.
entry.content: Yes, But I was just hoping someone would. When they can. Thanks.

entry.title: Default Values in Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Hi everybody,
one of our customers wants to use Default Values in Build Work Zone, standard edition according to the documentation here. However the request for saving the default values in the settings dialog

https://sandbox.cfapps.eu20.hana.ondemand.com/sap/opu/odata/UI2/INTEROP/PersContainers

results in an 404 Not Found, which is obvious, because the request is not routed to the S4 backend. Does anyone have an idea how to route this request, that is outside any of our apps, correctly? An idea that came in our mind is a Launchpad plugin, but we think there must be an easier solution. 

Does anyone have experience with Default Values in Build Work Zone and already solved this issue?

Any kind of help is appreciated. 

Best regards,

Marcel

entry.title: ABAP FTP_CONNECT with anonymous access
entry.content:
Hi,

I try to connect to an FTP server using ABAP. I want to connect with user/password, so I use the user anonymous with an email-Adresse as password.

The code looks like the following:

 

call function 'FTP_CONNECT'
  exporting
    user            = 'anonymous'
    password        = 'my@email.com'
    host            =  '95.31.30.236'
    rfc_destination = 'SAPFTP'
  importing
    handle          = hdl.

 

However, I when execute the programm, I get get the error

User anonymous is not allowed on 95.31.30.236.

But connecting to this server server using FileZilla with the same credentials, works well. So anonymous connection is allowed.

 

Any suggestions how to connect via ABAP using anonymous user?

Thx!

entry.title: Re: Ensuring Auto-Submission of Timesheets Without Overti...
entry.content: Hi Volker, Thank you for your confirmation. Could you please clarify your point of view?

entry.title: Re: To get change report which user changed sales order user profile status and release order.
entry.content:
Hi, I found Solution. Described as below. Please correct if there is anything needs to be corrected.

1: Find Object Number from VBAK table by entering Sale Order Number

2:Enter Object Number in JCDS table and you will get Status/Change Number/User/Date/Time.

Re: Missing Nodes In GS1 message mapping - PO to IS Migra...

entry.title: Re: Missing Nodes In GS1 message mapping - PO to IS Migra...

entry.title: Re: Missing Nodes In GS1 message mapping - PO to IS Migra...
entry.content: Unfortunately, we have looked at this and it won't help us as there are a lot of XSD'd which needed to be imported and then linked across different files cause of dependencies.

entry.title: Re: Troubleshooting SAP Certification discount code for special programs
entry.content: First of all, I would like to extend my greetings to you, Mr. David. I was honored to receive an email from you, but I followed these steps since I received the email containing the free code, but it did not accept activation. This is the problem. I have attached a picture of the problem that appears during activation. Please, Mr. David, help me activate the code so that I can achieve my dream of taking the exam and succeeding.

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Cloud and Bots Filtering
entry.content:
Hi @kai_unewisse,

By experience, all strategies you're mentioned are not efficients. When Bot is not declaring itself, they're often using hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) to host their bots army. In this case, IP ranges can be changed easily. 

And SAP Commerce Cloud disallow list is not designed to be updated frequently. It is more to allow only IP from CDN, or/and from Employees, or/and to block an entire geographical plate (as Asia for example).

Lightweight firewall into SAP Commerce (Tomcat) won't be efficient. It is too far in downstream. You will have to setup larger hardware to support the workload / processing...

Unfortunately, modern CDN is the only serious option.

entry.title: Re: Default Values in Build Work Zone
entry.content: Hope that @Jocelyn_Dart could direct that to someone who could answer.

entry.title: Planning Profile and Actual cost posting in CO15
entry.content:
Hi all,

We use two planning profiles for calculating the cost. SAPALL and ZSAPALL. For Company code A we use SAPALL and for Company code B we use ZSAPALL. 

When we maintain activity prices for a plant in company code B using ZSAPALL, values are hitting in SAPALL profile as well. Before maintaining the activity prices, i did maintain the ZSAPALL profile using KP04.

Issue is : my overhead costs in ZSAPALL profile is 0.5 INR. But in SAPALL profile it shows as 0 since thats in EUR.

While doing confirmation for a production order in company code B, i am facing "error in determining actual costs for the order". 

While running the costing in CK11N, system picks up the planning profile ZSAPALL, but while doing production order confirmation, it refers to SAPALL profile. How to change that ?

Please guide.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Code comparison in 2 systems using CCLM
entry.content:
HI SAP Support,
We have setup CCLM in our project and we would like to know if there is an option in CCLM to compare custom code in 2 different systems and displays the results?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Code comparison in 2 systems using CCLM
entry.content:
CityModel tile in the CCM WorkCenter would be helpful in your case. Although City model gives overview on custom code in each system, it does not allow comparison of two different system at the same time.
Please refer to this documentation on CCM : https://dam.sap.com/mac/app/e/pdf/preview/embed/BQWpoPm?ltr=a
On page 31 you can find more information on CityModel
I don't think we have any tile that is just for comparing like that, I would say you also could probably use CCM reporting tile to check the same data for different systems.

entry.title: Re: CDS VIEW ENTITY - CURR / QUAN calculated field gives...
entry.content:
NB: You will require the currency codes in the view: bkpf-waers and t001-waers

NB: field rfccur is related to amount fcsl, not dmbtr or wrbtr

entry.title: Re: How to navigate directly to the commercial tab of the...
entry.content: Look at report BUSSTART or use a where-used search on the class.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

I identify as a person in the category of the following:
Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographical location

I have some knowledge about material management and i would like to extend my knowledge to take the opportunity of the digital skills initiative “to be able to certify in material management and to start a career as sap consultant.

entry.title: Planned order not consuming inventory
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are creating a CIR and post MRP, for components it creates a planned order, but it do not consume existing stock, rather it creates planned order for whole quantity.

Please suggest settings we should do so that it should consume stock first and then create planned order if needed.

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: ABAP Calling last calling program in the stack
entry.content: Please send the WHOLE flow logic of screen 400 of program ZPROG1 and the WHOLE PAI module where you call transaction ZTRANS. You will find the flow logic at screen definition. It should start with "PROCESS BEFORE OUTPUT". The code of the module starts with "MODULE ... INPUT." and ends with "ENDMODULE."

entry.title: Re: Help needed in HR forms WT1000 (Working hours) cumula...
entry.content: Hi sikindar, yes you are right, and this functionality is working and setup as standard. I am talking about particular wagetype(1000), which is being calculated into forms.

entry.title: 🔵 Using CAP and Generative AI Hub to call OData APIs that get real stuff done in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Discover how Generative AI and CAP come together to make working with complex backend systems a breeze. We'll guide you on how to get started with SAP Build Apps and your preferred IDE, demonstrate OData payload generation with SAP S/4HANA, and share a successful customer example that puts it all together in a productive solution.

Speaker: Frank Densborn and James Rapp

entry.title: Re: How can I Improve performance of Below code.
entry.content: Hi @AadivaramAbbulu ,  I suggest write a CDS for the tables and fields required -  CDHDR , CDPOS , USR21 , ADR6 . use appropriate joins to fetch all fields required and then use it in your report. It will improve the performance of the report rather than using loops and read statement and appending.

entry.title: Re: Manual posting on Assets Reconciliation Account

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Hello @David_Chaviano

    • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 
    • First generation college students
    • People looking to switch their careers mid-life

I have completed my first learning journey in SAP FICO and I awaiting my certification attempt

Thank you

Mohamed Mo'men

entry.title: Error - Failed to start outlook, Internal Instance of outlook is null.
entry.content: I am creating a simple automation of outlook using this https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-create-outlook-automation.html#6d46ac9d-1797-4178-808d-8438c019d13b . But i'm getting error "Error - Failed to start outlook, Internal Instance of outlook is null. " when i'm testing the automation.

entry.title: Re: After running CVI synchronization - popup to confirm...
entry.content:
Look for

  • OSS notes such as 3416866 - Messages "Changes ... have not yet been confirmed" incorrectly displyed at creation of supplier or customer or 1238924 - Sensitive fields cannot be updated via BP synchronization 
  • Check your Customizing for 'Sensitive Fields'

Consider using another tool to upload data as direct insert in LFBK and KNBK seems to be insufficient, as well as improper use.

  • Which 'certified external tool' did you use?

entry.title: Re: Flow Function of the Month: Dismiss Keyboard 🏆
entry.content:
Indeed it would be nice, but as per my understanding of the current state of SAP Build Apps and the roadmap, it won't be coming anytime soon. 

My experience when working with a lot of input fields or even soft tabs, conditional renderers and lists is that I tend to offload all 'event management' to the logic canvas of the page rather than keeping logic on each component. So here is an overview of what I usually do: 
1. Let's take a login form: add email input field.
2. onBlur and onSubmitEditing events are wired up to a 'Trigger event' logic. 
3. On the page logic canvas I would add a 'Receive event' logic node with the name 'emailInputFinished'
4. Then on the email input I would trigger the 'emailInputFinished' event in my 'Trigger event' logic. 
5. This allows me to handle and maintain all the crucial logic on the page canvas and to have a good overview of what can go wrong. 

In this setup there is just one last thing that doesn't work out of the box and that is 'sending data over with the trigger event' node (such as the information of the component and the values), which has been a limitation for as long as long I'm using the tool. 😅 But that's solvable, if you use page or app level variables in your input fields. That solves most of these issues.

entry.title: Re: I want to make only certain rows editable in table co...
entry.content:
What exactly have you coded in the PBO logic?

  • Paste your relevant code, it should be some LOOP AT SCREEN / MODIFY SCREEN within a LOOP WITH CONTROL in PROCESS BEFORE OUTPUT logic.

entry.title: Re: Understanding Task Types and Sources in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hallo @Jagmohan_Chawla 

I'm new in the ALM world.
I'll appreciate if you advise me  when do we use : User Story in task creation ?

And where can i see the different between User Story and Project Task, once i create a task

BR

Nati

entry.title: Re: Transfer price for group valuation in PO
entry.content: As per my understanding, only materials with price control S will have group valuation. If the material in receiver plant is assigned price control V, the price from sender company cannot become the group cost of the receiver side. Linux Gao.

entry.title: Re: [SAP BTP Onboarding Series] - Step-by-Step guide to activate your SAP Build Work Zone, Advanced
entry.content:
Hello @nageshcaparthy ,
Thank you for sharing. It's very good article, we could finish the SAP WZAE setup by using this document. I see everything perfect in steps, but could you please clarify few topics:

  • Why it's necessary have SAML for DWS? In our installation SAP WZAE works without SAML between IAS and DWS (but we deleted it after setup complition)
  • Trusting between subaccount and IAS - if we do it manually, we can select the SAML protocol for bundled application:

but in the way you have used the protocol is OpenID Connect for bundled application. Could you please clarify the difference?

BR, Slava

entry.title: Re: I want to make only certain rows editable in table co...
entry.content:
FIELD-SYMBOLS: <lfs_cntrl> TYPE scxtab_column.

  LOOP AT sch_chain-cols ASSIGNING <lfs_cntrl>.
    IF <lfs_cntrl>-screen-name EQ 'GW_CHAIN_JOB-JOBNAME' OR <lfs_cntrl>-screen-name EQ 'GW_CHAIN_JOB-START_TIME' OR
      gw_chain_job-scheduled EQ gc_schedule .
      <lfs_cntrl>-screen-input = 1.
    ELSEIF gw_chain_job-scheduled EQ gc_scheduled.
      <lfs_cntrl>-screen-input = 0.
      ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.

sch_chain is my table control and scheduled is my column 7 flag

The above code is within my PBO loop with table control

entry.title: SAC Planning Monitor Trace PLUGIN_ERROR
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

SAC planning model has two Import jobs and their Refresh is scheduled daily. Schedule time, as well as Last run for both import jobs is displayed in the screenshot below. Also, In Data Timeline panel you can see that today data was refreshed successfully.

However, if you look at System/Monitor Trace, you can see error regarding failed refresh (7:33h) right after first import job refresh was finished in model (7:21h). This pattern repeats almost every day. Does anyone know why this error appears and what it means? More importantly, is planning model being refreshed daily or not?

KR,

Marija

entry.title: S/4HANA for Public Cloud: error message "You do not have start authorization"
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working with SAP Public Cloud Edition Professional Services and have encountered an issue that I am unable to resolve. I would appreciate any help or guidance regarding the error I am facing.

Here are the details of the error message:

When attempting to open a self-developed app in the test system, the following error messages appear: "You do not have start authorization R3TR IWSV ..." and "No authorization to access service group ..." (/IWBEP/CM_V4_COS 011). These error messages did not occur in the development system when the app is opened in the development system.

Has anyone experienced a similar issue or knows how to resolve this? Any tips or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,

Martin

entry.title: Re: Add standard field to Fiori App F2358
entry.content: Hello @Kristian2, If the purpose is just to download the list of PO items and pass on to the 3PLs, kindly use the app 'Manage Purchase Orders' it has incoterms at both level. Now as I mentioned the purpose of every app will be unique which may or may not serve the purpose of each and every customer in a way they expects it to be. Now the purpose to provide such CDS views and extension point is to make sure that there is a possibility to extend for customer as per their need. Best Regards, Vijayendra

entry.title: Screen Personas : Change Cell Value In Table
entry.content:
I can read the data in the table as below, but I cannot change the cell value.
The screen does not change. The table is not editable.

if(session.idExists("wnd[0]/usr/cntlC_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell/shellcont[1]/shell/shellcont[1]/shell"))
{
    session.utils.alert("Table exist");
    var table = session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlC_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell/shellcont[1]/shell/shellcont[1]/shell");
    var rowsCount = table.rowCount;
    session.utils.alert("Table Row Count:" + rowsCount);
 for(var index = 0; index < rowsCount; index ++){
     var cellValue = table.getCellValue(index, "FIT_TRA_ID");      
     //Cell value fills successfully.
     session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlC_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell/shellcont[1]/shell/shellcont[1]/shell").
     modifyCell(index,"SOURCE_CREATED_BY",cellValue);//Not Working
 }
}

But from a parametrization perspective, I think I didn't encounter any S/4HANA specific parameters. This was all basically in the area of general ABAP Platform parametrization.

please help me to validate Date format which is coming from source table or file  in SAP Datasphere.

Bala

entry.title: Re: Ensuring Auto-Submission of Timesheets Without Overti...
entry.content:
Hello Kahlid

your question was "but I’m looking for advice on whether there are other methods or solutions available to address this issue. "

And my answer was: that´s the way to go.

So, use this rule, detail it out and then you can sent an approval only when the system calculated overtime. Or if you have dedicated overtime time types than you can send them directly into approval with the single record approval. However, if you use for example only a working time time type and the system calculates the overtime portions, then you need to query the time valuation results in your rule to decide if a workflow should be send or not. Did you read the implementation guide? Not quite sure, but I think there is an example in it.

entry.title: Re: Is there any availability matrix for cloud applications support by SAP CTMS ?
Re: Direct Debit Returns in Bank Statement
entry.content:
Hello Bohdan,

Thanks for the detailed explanation!

I am facing one issue, our client is using CODA format bank statements and the process is bank statement shows incoming payment as and when bank received direct debit mandate and when the direct debit is rejected, bank again sends it as rejected payment.

By the time rejection communicated, incoming payment already clears the interim account, now for the rejection there is no open item in interim account to reverse. I am facing challenge to automate this flow.

Any suggestion would be highly appreciated.

Thanks & Regards,

Anusha

entry.title: Re: Is there any availability matrix for cloud applications support by SAP CTMS ?
entry.content:
Hi @Harald_Stevens , thank you for your reply.
If I understand correctly, there is currently nothing specifically planned in the roadmap. Is that correct?
In the cloud, each application seems to have its own transport mechanism. I think it would be beneficial to have an integrated solution, especially for IBP and other applications.

entry.title: Re: date of birth Year is to be Hidden
entry.content:
Hi there!

Are you inquiring as to the EC related field view within the biographical portlet area?

If so- we created a business rule (configure business rules) that only permissioned certain group members to have that field view and the log in user themselves (to prevent additional and unintended proxy visibility). It was conditional that if the user attempting to view as not a group member in those areas, they were not provisioned view/edit, etc. 

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: Is there any availability matrix for cloud applications support by SAP CTMS ?
entry.content: Hi Harald, thank you for your reply. There is currently nothing planned in the roadmap for Cloud Transport. Is that correct? In the cloud, each application has kind of its own transport mechanism. I think it would be beneficial to have an integrated solution, especially for IBP and other applications.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Release Navigator for SAP BTP - What's New in Q2 2024
entry.content:
Hi all,

the Q3 2024 update to the navigator is now live - check out the details in this blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/release-navigator-for-sap-btp-what-s-new-in-q3-2024/ba-p/13856736

entry.title: Re: IBM MQ QA server not reachable from Cloud Connector
entry.content:
That means if you configure a TLS connection to server abc.mycorp.com then the server certificate obtained from this server also must be issued for SAN abc.mycorp.com. Reconfigure your target server address to some other valid alternative domain or IP address covered by the certificate SAN names or install a new appropriate TLS server certificate on peer side with additional SANs.

But if you are trying to establish a TLS connection to server abc.mycorp.com and the peer certificate only says "I'm valid for SAN's xyz.corp.net and IP 80.155.32.18" then this server is not trusted. This might even be a man-in-the-middle attack.

entry.title: Line Limit in Stories -SAC
entry.content:
Hi!

When selecting all months in the filter in the story, this message appears:


"Processing on the backend was interrupted due to too high a volume of data involved in intermediate calculations. To reduce data volume, check the following options:

1. Reduce the number of dimensions on the axes.

2. Reduce the number of exception aggregation dimensions.

3. Reduce the number of measurements/counts requested.

4. Add restrictive filters for dimensions that lie on an axis and/or for dimensions that can be, directly or indirectly, used as an exception aggregation dimension."

 

What should I do to unlimited the number of lines in the story in SAC planning?

entry.title: Re: Validation like committed qty not greather than avail...
entry.content: I need to set validation for same.

entry.title: Re: Details understanding into BoM and Production order S...
entry.content: Hi, Need to Details understanding into Production order as well.

entry.title: Re: Help creating a promotion in SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
I managed to solve this, the trick is in the Action. Put the qualifying Products or Categories inside a CONTAINER. Important is to set the Quantity Per Order entry to 1

In the ACTIONS, add a "Target fixed price on partner products" action. Refer to the container name created in the Conditions. Here the trick is to set the Qualifying Product Containers to 0 and the Target Product Containers to 10

That is it, works like a charm. I got inspiration from this article 3245737 - How to set up promotion with products combination within one category - SAP for Me but I didn't need to do the double promotion they did there

entry.title: Re: After running CVI synchronization - popup to confirm...
entry.content:
Hi Raymond, actually the issue was not on the migration tool, but in fact on the dual control principle and the customising that checks the changes on the customer and vendor, because they were identified as sensitive fields.

For anyone else that might have this topic in the future, this note helped. https://me.sap.com/notes/3018771/E

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA for Public Cloud: error message "You do not have start authorization"
entry.content: As an additional information, according to SAP note 3399748 the reason for the error message could be missing Business Batalog SAP_CORE_BC_EXT_TST. And according to SAP note 2807442 this Business Catalog does not exist in the quality system, only in the development system. But how to prevent this error then in the quality system?

entry.title: Re: Details understanding into BoM and Production order S...
entry.content:
Hi @nikunjmehta2290 ,

 

For production order details, Kindly I request you to refer the below mentioned link 👇https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/knowledge-exchange-b1-production-module/qaq-p/13856076

entry.title: What causes material to be stuck in 921?
entry.content:
We have a lot of inventory movement between 0002 and 0003 locations. By end of business day, It is nothing to have 5 to 10 materials numbers "stuck" in 921 even after transfers have been confirmed. The way our pick process is designed, negative balances in 921 generally occur when a pick has not been 100% confirmed. I understand 921 is a transitional location, creating both a negative balance in 921 and a positive balance in 0003. What would cause the negative balance to remain after the transfer has been confirmed?

Also, what causes positive balance to remain in 921 after a transfer is confirmed? 99% of the time, the original SUs are no longer in a 0002 location, but are physically in floor stock (0003). 

It is time consuming to check these each and every day, but its part of the job. If i had a better understanding of what would cause these balance to get "stuck" I might be able to devise ways to prevent or reduce these. I can also clarify more if needed.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Elastic Scaling of Application Servers
entry.content:
@FrankJentsch ,

I have question, can we utilize or share one ABAP Environment with multiple subaccounts within one global account. If possible how can we do that.

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Re: Handling SELECT OPTIONS in CDS using Table Function
entry.content: If you use a list of values as input, you could think of using an alternative could be using a (temporary) table that holds your values from the selection combined with a join

entry.title: Deleting data deleted in the source system with idoc in the target system
entry.content:
How can I delete a data that is deleted in the source system using idoc?

For example, let's say a DE definition is deleted from a data in a material table.
How can I ensure that this DE definition is deleted in the target system with IDOC?
